import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma"; import Link from "next/link"; import { Bell, UserCircle, Activity } from "lucide-react"; import EEGLogo from "@/components/EEGLogo"; import T from "@/components/T"; export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'; export default async function SMDashboard() { const smEmail = "sm@worksite.com"; const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { email: smEmail }, include: { projectsAsSM: { include: { tasks: true, weeklyPlans: true, }, }, }, }); if (!user) return
; const totalTasks = user.projectsAsSM.reduce((acc, proj) => acc + proj.tasks.length, 0); return (
{/* Background Glows */}
{/* Top App Bar */}
EEG Management
{user.name}
{/* Global Status Section */}

{user.projectsAsSM.length}
{totalTasks}
{/* Projects & Quick Actions */}
{user.projectsAsSM.map((proj) => (
{/* Project Header */}

{proj.name}

{proj.location || } {proj.tasks.length}
{/* Quick Action Grid (3D Icons) */}
{/* Action 1: Rapport (Orange) */}
{/* Action 2: Planning (Cyan) */}
{/* Action 3: Equipes (Green) */}
))} {user.projectsAsSM.length === 0 && (

)}
{/* Alertes Récentes */}

(2 ).
); }
